nodes.label: Server & Compute
nodes.description: Linux, Windows, macOS endpoint and server monitoring — CPU, memory, disk, processes, security events, and compliance.

nodes.label: Virtualization
nodes.description: VMware vSphere, Hyper-V, and KVM virtual infrastructure — host contention, VM sprawl, and capacity planning.

nodes.label: Containers & Orchestration
nodes.description: Docker, Kubernetes, OpenShift container platforms — crash loops, OOM kills, resource limits, and orchestration health.

nodes.label: Cloud Infrastructure
nodes.description: AWS, Azure, GCP cloud infrastructure — API auditing, cost anomalies, resource drift, and security posture.

nodes.label: Network Infrastructure
nodes.description: Routers, switches, firewalls, load balancers, wireless, SD-WAN, and Meraki — interface health, routing, and traffic.

nodes.label: Storage & Backup
nodes.description: SAN, NAS, object storage, and backup systems — capacity trends, latency, IOPS, and backup job monitoring.

nodes.label: Database & Data Platforms
nodes.description: SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and data platforms — slow queries, deadlocks, replication, and connection pools.

nodes.label: Application Infrastructure
nodes.description: Web servers, application servers, message queues, CDNs, and DNS — HTTP errors, response times, and SSL certificates.

nodes.label: Identity & Access Management
nodes.description: Active Directory, Entra ID, LDAP, MFA, and PAM — authentication failures, privilege escalation, and identity governance.

nodes.label: Security Infrastructure
nodes.description: Next-gen firewalls, IDS/IPS, endpoint protection, email security, web security, vulnerability management, SIEM & SOAR, and certificate/PKI — threat detection and SecOps. ESCU detections are distributed across subcategories 10.1–10.8.

nodes.label: Email & Collaboration
nodes.description: Microsoft 365, Exchange, Teams, and collaboration platforms — mail flow, audit logging, and DLP events.

nodes.label: DevOps & CI/CD
nodes.description: Source control, CI/CD pipelines, artifact management, and IaC — build failures, deployment frequency, and secret exposure.

nodes.label: Observability & Monitoring Stack
nodes.description: Splunk platform health, APM, synthetic monitoring, and log aggregation — indexer queues, search performance, and forwarder health.

nodes.label: IoT & Operational Technology (OT)
nodes.description: Building management, industrial control, Splunk Edge Hub, and IoT platforms — sensor data, anomaly detection, and OT security.

nodes.label: Data Center Physical Infrastructure
nodes.description: Power/UPS, cooling/CRAC, and environmental monitoring — battery health, thermal management, and physical security.

nodes.label: Service Management & ITSM
nodes.description: Ticketing systems and CMDB — incident trends, SLA compliance, MTTR, and change management correlation.

nodes.label: Network Security & Zero Trust
nodes.description: NAC (802.1X), micro-segmentation, and SASE — network access control, posture assessment, and zero trust enforcement.

nodes.label: Data Center Fabric & SDN
nodes.description: Cisco ACI, NSX-T, and software-defined networking — fabric health, policy compliance, and endpoint tracking.

nodes.label: Compute Infrastructure (HCI & Converged)
nodes.description: Cisco UCS, Nutanix, and hyper-converged infrastructure — blade health, service profiles, and hardware faults.

nodes.label: Cost & Capacity Management
nodes.description: Cloud cost monitoring and capacity planning — spend trends, idle resources, rightsizing, and budget alerts.

nodes.label: Industry Verticals
nodes.description: Industry-specific operational monitoring — energy, manufacturing, healthcare, transportation, oil & gas, retail, aviation, telecom, water utilities, and insurance.

nodes.label: Regulatory and Compliance Frameworks
nodes.description: Cross-industry regulatory compliance monitoring — GDPR, NIS2, DORA, CCPA, MiFID II, ISO 27001, NIST CSF, and SOC 2. Deployable SPL for PII detection, breach notification timelines, data subject rights tracking, ICT risk management, and continuous control evidence.

nodes.label: Business Analytics & Executive Intelligence
nodes.description: Business-aligned analytics for non-technical stakeholders — customer experience, revenue & sales, marketing ROI, HR & people, supply chain, finance, customer support, executive KPIs, and ESG sustainability reporting.
